entry.title: About me
entry.summary:
Hi, I'm Naren. I'm currently a computer science undergrad at UT Austin, and I expect to graduate in December 2018. My research interests span some intersection between the theory and application of machine learning. I'm particularly interested in developing machine learning algorithms with both provable guarantees and observable empirical successes. I'm fortunate to be advised by Professors Alex Dimakis and Adam Klivans.

News

  • I'll be at Facebook in the NYC office between September and November 2018.
  • I'll be wrapping up my undergrad thesis sometime between June and August 2018.
